settings.eyebrow: Donated by brands. Worn for good.
settings.headline:
Fashion that
funds futures
settings.subheadline: Premium brands like Reformation and Guess donate their overstock to us. We sell it at accessible prices. Every purchase funds job training and reentry programs through Homeboy Industries.

settings.headline:
More than
a thrift store
settings.body: Homeboy Threads is the retail arm of Homeboy Industries — the world's largest gang intervention program. When you buy here, you're funding job training, mental health support, and real second chances for people who need it most. The brands we partner with believe in that too.

settings.label: of our graduates stay out of the justice system permanently
people served by Homeboy Industries each year in Los Angeles
of your purchase goes to brand profit. 100% supports the mission.

settings.title: Brands donate
settings.body: Premium brands like Reformation and Guess donate overstock, samples, and returned items to us instead of sending them to landfill. Every piece is inspected and graded before it hits our store.

settings.title: You shop
settings.body: Browse curated pieces from real brands at 50–70% below retail. Each listing includes the brand, condition grade, measurements, and a direct line to the impact your purchase creates.

settings.title: We fund futures
settings.body: Every dollar of revenue goes straight back into Homeboy Industries programming — job training, mental health services, tattoo removal, and reentry support for men and women in Los Angeles.

settings.name: Reformation
settings.description: The sustainable "it girl" brand worn by Rihanna and Bella Hadid donates overstock and samples directly to Homeboy Threads. Dresses, tops, and denim at a fraction of retail — with a mission behind every purchase.

settings.name: Guess
settings.description: Iconic denim, bold branding, and everyday essentials. Guess donates a range of styles from classic jeans to going-out pieces. Perfect for anyone who wants recognizable labels without retail prices.

settings.headline:
Be first for
the next drop
settings.body: New donations arrive weekly. Join our list to get early access to new arrivals from your favorite brands — before they sell out.
settings.success_message: Thanks for subscribing! Watch your inbox for the next drop.

settings.title: 100% donated inventory
settings.description: Every piece comes directly from brand partners — no secondhand sourcing, no mystery origin.

settings.title: Condition graded
settings.description: Every item is inspected and graded A+, A, or B before listing. No surprises on arrival.

settings.title: Real impact, tracked
settings.description: We show exactly how your purchase translates to hours of job training or services funded.

settings.title: Easy returns
settings.description: 30-day returns on all items. If it's not right, we make it right — no questions asked.
